title: Digital School Clinic Monitoring System
description: A full-stack web application for managing student health services with secure authentication, real-time data handling, and organized medical record management. Administrators can monitor patient vitals, manage records, and respond to alerts through a structured dashboard.

title: Attendance Monitoring System
description: A web-based attendance system developed for EE Days to track and record participant attendance efficiently. It allows authorized administrators to log student time-in and time-out while keeping records accurate and organized.

title: Score Tally System
description: A web-based score tally platform for EE Days that records results across academic, sports, and sociocultural events. The system lets administrators input rankings, automatically calculates team points, and shows real-time leaderboard standings.
